architecture_decisions: Represent ADS as a DAG so implementation order can be validated before build stages.
Require explicit owner, authority, and accountability for every component.
Trace components to OFM outcomes and success criteria to prevent architecture drift.

components.name: ADS architecture packet schema
components.purpose: Defines the architecture component, dependency, ownership, and traceability contract.

components.name: ADS DAG ownership validator
components.purpose: Validates architecture packets, rejects cycles, and enforces component ownership.

components.name: ADS gate fixtures
components.purpose: Proves pass and fail behavior for DAG and ownership contracts.

CMP-001.accountability: schema changes require validator and fixture updates

CMP-003.accountability: proves both pass and block paths
